## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Parser or extraction behavior
- [ ] Tests or fixtures
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI or contributor workflow
- [ ] Other maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept this focused on Excel-to-CSV preprocessing.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I reviewed any generated CSV/golden output changes.
- [ ] I understand contributions are licensed under GNU AGPLv3 or later.
- [ ] I ran `.venv/bin/pytest`.
- [ ] I ran `.venv/bin/ruff check scripts/ tests/`.
- [ ] I ran `.venv/bin/ruff format --check scripts/ tests/`.

## Notes for the maintainer

Mention anything that needs special review, such as a new official workbook layout, a CSV contract change, or a documentation decision.
